dict.string: Klik would like to access your calendar to automatically save meeting events and reminders from your conversations.
Klik would like to access your reminders to automatically create action items and follow-ups from your meetings.
Klik uses the microphone to capture your conversations so it can summarize and follow up. Recording continues while the app is in the background.
Klik uses speech recognition to convert your voice into text for the AskKlik chat.
Klik connects to your Klik One hardware so it can stream audio from your conversations, including while the app is in the background.
Klik communicates with your Klik One hardware over Bluetooth to receive audio and control the device.
